title: GSK shelves camlipixant chronic cough drug
headline: GSK discontinued Phase 3 chronic cough drug camlipixant after mixed data, marking the third failure in the P2X3 antagonist class and raising write-down risk on its ~$2B Bellus Health acquisition.
key_facts: $2B Bellus Health acquisition; third P2X3 antagonist class failure

title: Novartis Fabhalta wins full FDA approval in IgAN
headline: FDA converted Fabhalta's accelerated approval to full traditional approval for immunoglobulin A nephropathy (IgAN), solidifying its commercial position in kidney disease treatment.
key_facts: Conversion from accelerated to full approval; eGFR kidney function decline endpoint confirmed

prior_coverage.headline: Vera Therapeutics secured FDA approval for an IgA nephropathy (IgAN) therapy, competing against Otsuka's offering.

title: Boehringer Ingelheim's Jascayd wins EU approval
headline: Jascayd received European regulatory approval from EMA on July 17, 2026.

prior_coverage.headline: Zealand Pharma (ZLDPF) plunged ~23% on June 8 after Phase 3 SYNCHRONIZE-1 data showed 19% discontinuation rate due to GI side effects, with >40% reporting vomiting.

title: Jasper Therapeutics acquires Kira Pharmaceuticals
headline: Jasper Therapeutics completed all-stock acquisition of Kira Pharmaceuticals with concurrent $132M private placement, securing runway into H2 2028 and out-licensing complement assets to Mirador Therapeutics.
key_facts: $132M private placement; $12M upfront to Mirador Therapeutics; out-licensed KP-301 and KP-402; stock +20%; runway to H2 2028; retained KP-104, briquilimab, KP-701

prior_coverage.headline: Four previously covered stories were monitored with no material updates found: Viridian's Lumvoa approval, Biogen/Apellis pipeline cuts, Merck KGaA's Bio-Techne deal, and Amgen's Tavneos CHMP recommendation.

title: Novo Nordisk & Alvotech FDA inspections
headline: Novo Nordisk and Alvotech received written observations following FDA site inspections on July 17, 2026.
key_facts: FDA site inspection writeups timestamp Jul 17, 2026, 10:56am

title: Pfizer downgraded to Hold rating
headline: Pfizer downgraded to Hold on delayed pipeline catalysts, management changes, and reduced near-term re-rating potential.
key_facts: NYSE: PFE; rating downgrade to Hold

title: ARS Pharmaceuticals stock drops on neffy coverage miss
headline: ARS Pharmaceuticals (SPRY) shares sank after-hours following announcement of no new insurance coverage decisions for neffy in July formulary cycle.
key_facts: SPRY ticker; neffy formulary coverage miss in July cycle

title: Celcuity FDA approval but shares fall ~20%
headline: Celcuity won FDA approval for breast cancer drug Revtorpyk but shares fell nearly 20% following a launch delay and prescribing information surprises.
key_facts: ~20% share drop; Revtorpyk launch delayed; prescribing info surprised analysts

prior_coverage.headline: Celcuity receives FDA approval for breast cancer drug Revtorpyk but shares fall nearly 20% on disclosed launch delay.

title: GSK launches Alzheimer's prevention study with shingles vaccine
headline: GSK is launching a large clinical study investigating whether its shingles vaccine can prevent or delay Alzheimer's disease onset.
key_facts: Large prevention study; shingles vaccine indication expansion to Alzheimer's

title: Eli Lilly Foundayo (orforglipron) scripts rising
headline: Eli Lilly's oral GLP-1 agonist Foundayo (orforglipron) shows increasing prescription uptake according to FiercePharma tracking.
key_facts: Foundayo approved; script uptake increasing; FiercePharma tracker 10:30am

prior_coverage.headline: Eli Lilly's oral GLP-1 orforglipron (Foundayo) approved April 1, 2026 for adults with obesity/overweight + comorbidities; launch described as muted vs Novo's Wegovy pill.
